SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIPER, LESLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAXTON, CHRISTINE $1,308.67 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,308.67, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR $630.00 AN AMOUNT THAT DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PAXTON, CHRISTINE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT PIPER, LESLIE $2,799.86 PRINCIPAL, $163.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,963.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
